Ecosystem Layer 02

Movable Charger.

The Flexibility Layer

Wheeled mobile charging units. Rather than blocking premium parking spaces with stationary sockets, roll the Movable Charger directly to parked vehicles.

22kW
Fast AC Charging
5m
Cable Retraction range
10kWh
LFP buffer battery
Request Mobile Layout Proposal
Maximum Asset Utilization

Bring the plug to the vehicle, not the other way around.

Fixed charger terminals cause a structural slot bottleneck: once a vehicle finishes charging, it continues to occupy the spot, blocking other users and creating parking disputes.

The Movable Charger eliminates stationary space constraints. By allowing valets and parking attendants to slide units sequentially between parked vehicles, you charge three times as many cars daily using the same power capacity.

Workflow design

The Mobile Charging Sequence

How property attendants slide mobile units sequentially between bays to maximize utilization yields.

01

Slide Unit

Valet unlocks the unit via app and rolls it behind the double-parked EV.

02

Connect Plug

अटेंडेंट connects the Retractable Type-2 cable to start the session.

03

Charge Sequential

Fast 22kW charging initiates, managed safely by the Smart DB loop.

04

Retract Cable

At session end, internal balancer counter-weights pull the cable back.

05

Secure Lock

Attendant engages electromagnetic brakes to lock the unit in place.

Case Studies

Optimizing commercial yields.

Case Study: Malls & Retail

Grand Central Mall space bottlenecks

Grand Central Mall installed 4 fixed fast chargers. Shoppers left vehicles plugged in all afternoon while dining, creating queues. Replacing them with 2 Movable Chargers operated by the valet team allowed staff to charge cars in sequence.

Outcome: Daily session throughput rose from 8 to 22. Shopping slots are kept fully clear.

Case Study: Workplace

Tech Park Block C fleet setups

An office park basement parking needed to charge 40 tenant EVs. Upgrading individual slots required heavy cable trenching and power transformer capital. Deployed 4 Movable Chargers sequentially operated by roaming valets.

Outcome: Trenching and transformer capital costs cut by 65%.

Technical Details

Movable Charger Specifications

Comprehensive mobile charging hardware specifications.

Power Parameters

Output Rating Up to 22 kW AC Fast
Battery Block 10 kWh LFP cell buffer
Peak Management Integrated cell leveling

Mechanical Details

Connector Cable 5-meter Type-2
Cable Balancer Mechanical retraction
Brakes Electromagnetic Lock

Chassis & Rating

Wheels 6-inch solid polyurethane
Shock Absorbers Dual spring suspension
Casing Protection IP54 / IK10 impact
